did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a non-learning-based method for skin lesion segmentation using adaptive thresholding with normalization of color models (RGB and XYZ). The authors explicitly state that their methods are 'non-learning' and 'do not require any training tasks,' distinguishing them from deep learning approaches which are only cited for comparison purposes.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
